entry.title: New IDC W56KGU18D0004 awarded to THE MITRE CORPORATION for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: AWARD OF INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT FOR NATIONAL SECURITY ENGINEERING CENTER (NSEC) FEDERALLY FUNDED RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT CENTER(FFRDC).

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: R&D- OTHER RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT (ENGINEERING DEVELOPMENT)

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT IN THE PHYSICAL, ENGINEERING, AND LIFE SCIENCES (EXCEPT NANOTECHNOLOGY AND BIOTECHNOLOGY)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
